headline: Assessing Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Digital Growth Story
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Builders FirstSource (BLDR) has been under pressure recently, with the stock showing negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months, which may have some investors reassessing their exposure.
